examples: arouse pity
raise a smile
evoke sympathy
She woke up to the sound of the alarm clock

meanings.definition: summon into action or bring into existence, often as if by magic
examples: raise the specter of unemployment
he conjured wild birds in the air
call down the spirits from the mountain

meanings.definition: cause to be alert and energetic
examples: Coffee and tea stimulate me
This herbal infusion doesn't stimulate

meanings.definition: cause to become awake or conscious
examples: He was roused by the drunken men in the street
Please wake me at 6 AM.
As the thunder started the sleeping children began to stir
This movie usually arouses the male audience
the aroused opposition

meanings.definition: brought to a state of great tension
examples: all wound up for a fight
feeling horny

meanings.definition: keenly excited (especially sexually) or indicating excitement; - Bram Stoker
examples: his face all ablaze with excitement
he was aflame with desire
he would become emotional over nothing at all
she was worked up about all the noise
